title: Photopia - On-Demand Booking Ecosystem
subtitle: Backend, Admin Portal & Mobile API Integration
description: A comprehensive media booking ecosystem. Designed and developed the high-performance backend architecture, secure Stripe Connect payouts, and built the Next.js admin dashboard. Also collaborated with the Flutter mobile team to design and integrate REST/WebSocket APIs, real-time messaging, and incremental offline caching protocols.
highlights: Built Next.js admin dashboard for managing service categories, themes, and platform metrics
Implemented Stripe Connect split-payment logic for automated professional earnings payouts
Designed and documented RESTful APIs to facilitate seamless frontend and mobile integrations
Built real-time notification scheduling and bidirectional Socket.io messaging engine
Created incremental offline sync protocols for caching Hadith libraries and articles locally
Collaborated with the Flutter mobile team to optimize mobile-to-backend data flows and push notifications

title: Roadtripeado - Travel & Local Business Mapping System
subtitle: Interactive Location Directory, Award Milestones & Subscriptions
description: A robust Express TypeScript backend system designed for a road-trip directory and mapping service. It manages interactive map pins, user awards/achievements, real-time communications via Socket.io, and a subscription-based model allowing local businesses to show their locations and offer deals. Equipped with automated cron scheduling, Stripe payments, and structured Winston logging.
highlights: Built a secure, tiered business subscription engine using Stripe Payments for map visibility
Designed a real-time gamification and milestone system (Award System) for users to unlock achievements and free maps
Implemented live locations listing, category filtering, and favorites caching with MongoDB
Integrated real-time chat and support messaging using Socket.io and stored history in database
Configured robust file uploads to AWS S3 processed with Sharp, Zod schemas for request validation, and centralized API error handlers
Established cron-based automated scheduling for task processing and structured Winston logging
